title: OpenShift Airgap Architect Parameter Catalog Schema
description: JSON Schema for parameter catalog files in data/params/4.20/*.json

changelog.changes: Initial schema with path, outputFile, type, allowed, default, required, description, citations, applies_to
Added deprecation support: deprecated, deprecatedReason, replacementPath, removalVersion fields

version.description: OpenShift minor version this catalog covers

outputFile.description: Target YAML file where this parameter is written

type.description: Data type of the parameter value

allowed.description: Enum values (array) or free-form description (string). Empty array if no enum constraint.

oneOf.description: Free-form description of allowed values when not strict enum

examples: Array of channel objects with name, minVersion, maxVersion

default.description: Default value if not provided by user. Null if no default.

required.description: Whether parameter is required for the scenario. Conditional requirements should be false with conditions noted in description.

description.description: Comprehensive parameter description following gold standard tooltip format (What/When/Format/How/Important/Example sections)

applies_to.description: Optional list of scenario IDs this parameter applies to. If omitted, applies to current scenario only.

conditionals.description: Optional conditional logic (mutual exclusivity, visibility constraints)

mutuallyExclusive.description: List of parameter paths that cannot coexist with this parameter

visibleWhen.description: Conditions under which this parameter should be visible in UI

deprecated.description: ⭐ NEW v1.1.0: Marks parameter as deprecated. Shows orange 'Deprecated' badge in UI, adds warning to tooltip.

deprecatedReason.description: ⭐ NEW v1.1.0: Brief explanation of why parameter is deprecated and what to use instead. Shown in UI warning tooltip.
examples: Legacy single-zone field. Use failureDomains for multi-zone support.
Use imageDigestSources for IDMS-based mirroring instead of ICSP.

replacementPath.description: ⭐ NEW v1.1.0: Canonical parameter path that replaces this deprecated field. Shown in UI tooltip as migration guidance.

removalVersion.description: ⭐ NEW v1.1.0: OpenShift major version when this field will be removed (e.g., '5.0'). Helps users plan migration timeline.

parameters.description: Base DNS domain for the cluster.
⚠️ DEPRECATED: Legacy single-zone vSphere datacenter name. Use failureDomains[].topology.datacenter for multi-zone deployments.
parameters.deprecatedReason: Legacy single-zone field. Use failureDomains for multi-zone support.

notes: This schema documents the structure of parameter catalog files used by the OpenShift Airgap Architect application.
Catalog files are located in data/params/4.20/ (backend) and synchronized to frontend/src/data/catalogs/.
The 'deprecated' family of fields (v1.1.0) enables gradual migration from legacy fields to canonical replacements.
UI components (FieldLabelWithInfo) render deprecated parameters with orange badges and warning tooltips.
Backend validation (yamlValidator.js) logs warnings when deprecated fields are used in generated YAML.
Deprecation follows OpenShift semantic versioning: deprecate in minor version (4.20), remove in major version (5.0+).
